summary: Removed test_no_panic_unwrap_in_validation and test_imports_at_file_top which searched source for specific function names (deserialize_supported_python_version, python_version+deserializ patterns). Kept only behavioral tests that run cargo test on injected Rust test modules or execute cargo check/test/clippy/fmt/doc as subprocesses. NOP=0, GOLD=1 confirmed.
